input_text: Universiti awam ni memang tempat reserved untuk satu kaum je. Kaum lain kerja keras pun takde guna, sebab kuota dah decide semua. Sistem ni memang rasis.
reason: Frames university admission quotas as exclusively racist, generalizing an entire ethnic group as undeserving beneficiaries, stoking communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem kemasukan universiti perlu dikaji semula supaya lebih telus dan adil untuk semua pelajar tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: JAIS ni dah jadi macam polis rahsia. Masuk rumah orang sesuka hati, intai kehidupan peribadi. Ini bukan Islam, ini diktator agama.
reason: Spreads unverified claims comparing a religious authority to a secret police and dictatorial regime, inciting distrust and hostility toward legitimate institutions.
suggested_rewrite: Terdapat kebimbangan tentang prosedur penguatkuasaan JAIS. Kita perlu dialog terbuka tentang sempadan bidang kuasa dan hak individu.

input_text: Korang tengok la politikus tu, bini dia kerja kat syarikat kontraktor kerajaan. Ni address office dia kat Damansara. Sape nak pergi confront, jom.
reason: Shares workplace location of a public figure's spouse and encourages physical confrontation, constituting doxxing-adjacent behavior.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada syak wasangka konflik kepentingan, laporan rasmi boleh dibuat kepada SPRM untuk siasatan yang sewajarnya.

input_text: Ekonomi merudum sebab bangsa ni control semua perniagaan. Diorang monopoli pasaran, kita semua jadi hamba.
reason: Scapegoats an entire ethnic group for economic downturn, using dehumanizing language about enslavement, fueling communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah ekonomi perlu ditangani melalui dasar yang adil dan inklusif, bukan dengan menyalahkan mana-mana kaum secara menyeluruh.

input_text: Budak Orang Asli masuk universiti pun tak reti cakap BM betul. Baik bagi tempat tu kat orang yang layak. Buang duit je.
reason: Mocks indigenous students' language abilities and questions their worthiness of university placement, constituting targeted ethnic denigration.
suggested_rewrite: Pelajar Orang Asli mungkin memerlukan sokongan tambahan dalam peralihan ke universiti. Program mentor dan kelas bahasa boleh membantu mereka berjaya.

input_text: Masuk U pun kena tengok warna kulit. Anak aku straight A semua pun tak dapat tempat. Bangsa lain 5A je dah masuk. Memang dasar apartheid Malaysia.
reason: Compares Malaysian university admissions to apartheid, making inflammatory ethnic generalizations that deepen communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem kemasukan universiti perlu lebih telus supaya setiap pelajar berasa proses pemilihan adalah adil dan berasaskan merit.

input_text: Jabatan agama sekarang ni dah overpower. Nak kawal apa orang makan, pakai, buat. Fake news pun diorang sebar supaya orang takut. Hancurkan institusi ni.
reason: Makes unverified claims about religious authorities spreading fake news and calls for the destruction of the institution, inciting hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Ada kebimbangan tentang bidang kuasa jabatan agama. Perbincangan terbuka tentang reformasi dan akauntabiliti boleh membantu menangani isu ini.

input_text: Artis tu memang p***mak. Korang report semua akaun dia, hantar mesej suruh dia bunuh diri. Dia memang layak kena.
reason: Organizes a cyberbullying campaign against a public figure including incitement to self-harm, constituting severe targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda tidak bersetuju dengan tindakan seseorang, nyatakan kritikan secara sopan atau abaikan sahaja. Jangan sekali-kali menggalakkan kecederaan diri.

input_text: Tengah kemelesetan ni semua kedai kaum tu je yang survive. Mesti ada konspirasi, diorang tolong sesama sendiri je, biar kaum lain mati kelaparan.
reason: Promotes a conspiracy theory that one ethnic group deliberately causes economic suffering to others, fueling dangerous communal hostility during economic hardship.
suggested_rewrite: Semasa kemelesetan ekonomi, semua komuniti terkesan. Kita perlu menyokong satu sama lain dan menggalakkan dasar ekonomi yang inklusif.

input_text: Boss aku yang rasuah tu nama dia Ahmad Faisal, kerja kat Menara KWSP tingkat 15. Ni nombor phone dia, sape nak viralkan.
reason: Exposes personal details including name, workplace floor, and phone number to encourage vigilante harassment, constituting doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mengesyaki rasuah di tempat kerja, laporkan kepada SPRM atau saluran dalaman syarikat secara sulit.

input_text: Orang Asli ni hidup macam zaman batu lagi. Bagi duit pun tak reti guna. Baik kerajaan stop bazir duit untuk projek kampung diorang.
reason: Dehumanizes indigenous communities by comparing them to primitive peoples and arguing government aid is wasted on them.
suggested_rewrite: Projek pembangunan untuk komuniti Orang Asli perlu dirancang bersama mereka supaya lebih efektif dan menghormati keperluan sebenar mereka.

input_text: Vaksin kerajaan tu memang sengaja letak bahan haram untuk kaum Melayu. Diorang nak lemahkan umat Islam. Jangan ambil vaksin tu.
reason: Spreads dangerous fake medical claims targeting Malay Muslims, combining religious and ethnic conspiracy theories to discourage vaccination.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang kandungan vaksin, rujuk kepada pakar perubatan atau JAKIM yang telah mengesahkan status halal vaksin tersebut.

input_text: Quota universiti ni buat budak non-Bumi rasa macam second class citizen. Baik pindah negara lain je, sini memang takkan adil.
reason: Frames the quota system as making non-Bumiputera permanent second-class citizens, promoting divisive narrative and emigration sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem kuota universiti boleh dikaji semula untuk memastikan keadilan. Perbincangan konstruktif lebih baik daripada berputus asa dengan negara sendiri.

input_text: Doktor klinik tu si Ramasamy sengaja bagi ubat expired kat pesakit Melayu. Ini genocide perlahan. Sebarkan supaya semua orang tahu alamat klinik dia.
reason: Fabricates a medical genocide conspiracy targeting an individual doctor with ethnic framing, encouraging doxxing of their clinic.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda menerima ubat yang tidak sesuai, laporkan kepada Kementerian Kesihatan Malaysia untuk siasatan rasmi.

input_text: Majlis agama daerah ni paksa orang masuk Islam kalau nak nikah. Ini pemaksaan agama. Kita kena bangkit lawan institusi ni.
reason: Misrepresents religious conversion requirements in inflammatory terms and calls for uprising against religious institutions.
suggested_rewrite: Undang-undang perkahwinan antara agama memang kompleks. Perbincangan hormat tentang reformasi undang-undang keluarga boleh membantu semua pihak.

input_text: Influencer tu memang gemuk hodoh tak layak bersuara. Tag semua follower dia, bagi dia rasa malu sampai delete akaun.
reason: Body-shames a public figure and coordinates a mass harassment campaign to silence them from social media.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda tidak bersetuju dengan pendapat seseorang influencer, abaikan atau nyatakan pandangan berbeza secara sopan.

input_text: Harga rumah naik sebab developer kaum tertentu sengaja sorok unit untuk naikkan harga. Diorang memang tamak, nak rampas tanah kita semua.
reason: Scapegoats a specific ethnic group for rising housing prices with unverified conspiracy claims, using possessive language about land ownership.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah harga rumah memerlukan penyelesaian dasar yang komprehensif. Kita perlu mendesak kerajaan untuk peraturan pasaran hartanah yang lebih ketat.

input_text: Suku kaum Sabah Sarawak ni datang semenanjung curi kerja orang. Balik hutan la korang, sini bukan tempat korang.
reason: Directs hateful xenophobic rhetoric at East Malaysian indigenous communities, telling them to return to the jungle.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat Sabah dan Sarawak adalah sebahagian daripada Malaysia. Isu pekerjaan perlu ditangani melalui dasar ekonomi yang adil untuk semua.

input_text: Cikgu gay tu mengajar kat SMK Taman Desa. Nama dia Hafiz bin Ismail. Korang parents kena report dia, jangan biar anak korang dekat.
reason: Outs and doxxes a teacher based on alleged sexual orientation, inciting parents to target them professionally and personally.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang kelakuan guru, gunakan saluran aduan rasmi sekolah atau Jabatan Pendidikan tanpa mendedahkan maklumat peribadi.

input_text: Setiap kali ekonomi teruk, bangsa asing ni yang untung. Diorang dah rancang dari dulu untuk kuasai ekonomi negara kita. Bangun la Melayu!
reason: Promotes an ethnic conspiracy theory about economic domination and uses rallying cry to mobilize ethnic resentment during economic hardship.
suggested_rewrite: Cabaran ekonomi memerlukan kerjasama semua rakyat Malaysia. Kita perlu fokus kepada pembangunan kemahiran dan peluang untuk semua.

input_text: Ustaz daerah tu cakap perempuan yang tak tutup aurat layak dirogol. Ramai orang setuju. Memang patut pun, jangan salahkan lelaki.
reason: Attributes victim-blaming rhetoric to a religious figure and endorses it, normalizing sexual violence under religious justification.
suggested_rewrite: Keganasan seksual tidak pernah dibenarkan dalam Islam atau mana-mana agama. Semua orang berhak kepada keselamatan tanpa mengira cara berpakaian.

input_text: Budak trans kat sekolah tu perlu di-bully sampai dia faham dia tak normal. Parents korang kena ajar anak jangan kawan dengan dia.
reason: Incites bullying campaign against a transgender student and promotes social isolation, constituting targeted anti-LGBTQ+ harassment in schools.
suggested_rewrite: Semua pelajar berhak belajar dalam persekitaran yang selamat. Isu identiti perlu ditangani dengan bimbingan kaunselor secara sensitif.

input_text: Menteri tu rasuah confirm, bini dia drive Porsche. Nama company bini dia kat Cyberjaya tu scam je. Sebar alamat office dia.
reason: Spreads unverified corruption allegations with doxxing of a spouse's business address, encouraging vigilante action.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada bukti rasuah, laporkan kepada SPRM. Penyebaran tuduhan tanpa bukti dan maklumat peribadi boleh menjadi fitnah.

input_text: Kuota matrikulasi 90-10 tu memang bukti negara ni anti non-Bumi. Sistem ni nak pastikan kita semua jadi kuli selamanya.
reason: Frames matriculation quotas as deliberate systemic oppression designed to permanently subjugate non-Bumiputera, deepening ethnic divisions.
suggested_rewrite: Nisbah kemasukan matrikulasi perlu dibincangkan secara terbuka. Kajian menyeluruh boleh membantu mencari keseimbangan yang lebih adil.

input_text: Pekerja Bangladesh kat kilang tu yang sebar penyakit. Semua pendatang ni kotor, kena halau balik. Jangan beli dari kedai yang gaji diorang.
reason: Dehumanizes migrant workers with false disease-spreading claims, calls for boycott and expulsion based on nationality.
suggested_rewrite: Kesihatan pekerja asing perlu dijaga sama seperti rakyat tempatan. Majikan bertanggungjawab menyediakan kemudahan kesihatan yang mencukupi.

input_text: These Chinese Malaysians control all the wealth and they wonder why Malays are angry. Time to take back what's rightfully ours through whatever means necessary.
reason: Promotes the ethnic wealth conspiracy narrative and implies willingness to use any means to redistribute wealth, inciting communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Economic inequality is a complex issue that affects all communities. We need evidence-based policies that create opportunities for everyone, not ethnic scapegoating.

input_text: University spots should be based purely on merit. But no, in Malaysia the bumis get everything handed to them on a silver platter while we work ten times harder.
reason: Characterizes all Bumiputera students as undeserving recipients who don't work hard, reinforcing harmful ethnic stereotypes about academic merit.
suggested_rewrite: University admissions should balance merit with equitable access. A transparent review of the current system could help ensure fairness for all qualified students.

input_text: That Malay singer is so talentless, let's mass report her Spotify and send her DMs telling her she's worthless. Who's with me?
reason: Coordinates a cyberbullying campaign against a specific public figure including mass reporting and direct harassment messages.
suggested_rewrite: If you don't enjoy someone's music, simply don't listen to it. There's no need to organize harassment campaigns against artists.

input_text: JAKIM has no right to tell non-Muslims what we can and cannot eat. They're basically forcing Sharia on all Malaysians. This is religious tyranny.
reason: Misrepresents halal certification as forced Sharia imposition on non-Muslims, spreading misinformation to provoke anti-Islamic sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Halal certification primarily serves Muslim consumers. Concerns about its scope can be discussed constructively with relevant authorities without characterizing it as tyranny.

input_text: During recession only one race thrives because they send all their money overseas and cheat on taxes. We need to audit every single one of their businesses.
reason: Promotes unverified tax evasion conspiracy against an entire ethnic group and calls for discriminatory auditing based on race.
suggested_rewrite: Tax compliance should be enforced equally across all businesses. If there are concerns about tax evasion, LHDN should investigate without racial profiling.

input_text: Found out that activist's home address in Petaling Jaya. She works at that NGO on Jalan Bangsar. Someone needs to teach her a lesson about spreading liberal ideas.
reason: Shares residential area and workplace details of an activist, implying physical intimidation for her advocacy work.
suggested_rewrite: Disagreeing with an activist's views is acceptable, but sharing personal information and implying threats is wrong. Engage with ideas through proper debate channels.

input_text: Orang Asli people are so backwards, they can't even use a smartphone properly. Why waste taxpayer money educating them when they'll just go back to the jungle?
reason: Dehumanizes indigenous communities with primitive stereotypes and argues against their right to education, constituting hateful generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli communities deserve quality education tailored to their needs. Investment in their education benefits all of Malaysia's diverse society.

input_text: That gay couple posting their photos online in KL should be exposed to their employers. Drop their workplace details here so we can get them fired.
reason: Attempts to organize doxxing and employment retaliation against individuals based on their sexual orientation.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has a right to privacy and employment regardless of personal life. Targeting people's livelihoods based on who they are is harmful and potentially illegal.

input_text: Malaysian Indians are responsible for most of the gang violence. Statistics don't lie. We should increase police patrols in their neighborhoods specifically.
reason: Attributes gang violence to an entire ethnic group using vague statistical claims and advocates for racial profiling in policing.
suggested_rewrite: Gang violence is a socioeconomic issue that requires targeted community programs, youth intervention, and equal policing without racial profiling.

input_text: The religious police raided a private birthday party claiming it was immoral. Malaysia is becoming like Taliban Afghanistan. Time to dismantle these religious enforcers.
reason: Compares Malaysian religious authorities to the Taliban based on an unverified incident and calls for dismantling religious institutions.
suggested_rewrite: If religious enforcement actions seem disproportionate, we should advocate for clearer guidelines and accountability within the existing legal framework.

input_text: I've compiled a list of all the pro-opposition lecturers at UKM with their office numbers. Students, you know what to do. Make their lives difficult.
reason: Creates a targeting list of university lecturers based on political views and incites students to harass them, combining doxxing with organized intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Academic freedom means lecturers can hold diverse political views. If you disagree, engage in respectful intellectual debate rather than personal targeting.

input_text: Every time there's an economic crisis, the Malays suffer while the Chinese businesses somehow always bounce back. It's obvious they're rigging the system.
reason: Promotes the conspiracy that Chinese Malaysians rig the economic system, scapegoating an ethnic group during economic hardship.
suggested_rewrite: Economic resilience varies across sectors and communities. Understanding structural factors can help develop better support systems for all Malaysians during downturns.

input_text: Non-Muslim students shouldn't complain about university quotas. If you don't like it, go study in China or India where you came from.
reason: Tells non-Muslim Malaysian citizens to leave the country, denying their belonging and framing quota criticism as disloyalty.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysian citizens have the right to voice concerns about education policies. Constructive dialogue about admissions can lead to better outcomes for everyone.

input_text: That politician claiming to represent the Indian community is actually corrupt. His wife runs a shell company at this address in Mont Kiara. Go viral people!
reason: Spreads unverified corruption claims with ethnic framing and shares specific business address to encourage public vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: Corruption allegations should be reported to MACC with evidence. Sharing unverified claims and personal addresses can constitute defamation and endanger people.

input_text: The Orang Asli village got flooded again? Maybe if they learned to build proper houses instead of huts they wouldn't have this problem every year.
reason: Victim-blames indigenous communities for flood damage while mocking their traditional housing, dismissing systemic neglect of infrastructure.
suggested_rewrite: Recurring floods in Orang Asli villages point to inadequate infrastructure investment. The government should work with these communities on sustainable flood mitigation solutions.

input_text: Confirmed that the new deputy director at JPJ got the position because of race, not qualifications. Typical affirmative action disaster. The whole department will collapse now.
reason: Makes unverified claims about a specific appointment being race-based, predicting institutional collapse to delegitimize affirmative action and the appointee.
suggested_rewrite: Government appointments should be transparent about selection criteria. If there are concerns about qualifications, they can be raised through proper channels.

input_text: These transgender people in Penang are recruiting children. I have names and photos. Parents, protect your kids from these predators.
reason: Spreads the dangerous predator myth about transgender people and implies doxxing with names and photos, inciting moral panic.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about child safety should be reported to police, not social media. Spreading unverified accusations about any group can lead to dangerous vigilantism.

input_text: Why do Indian Malaysians keep complaining about temple demolitions? They have too many temples anyway. This is a Muslim country, deal with it.
reason: Dismisses legitimate concerns about temple demolitions while asserting religious supremacy, denying minority religious rights.
suggested_rewrite: Temple relocation or demolition is a sensitive issue. All religious communities deserve respect, and these matters should be handled through fair legal processes.

input_text: Medical supplies sent to East Malaysia are always expired because nobody cares about the Sabah Sarawak people. The government treats them like second-class citizens deliberately.
reason: Spreads unverified claims about deliberately sending expired medical supplies to East Malaysia, framing it as intentional government neglect to inflame regional tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Healthcare access in Sabah and Sarawak needs improvement. Advocacy for better medical supply chains should be directed at the Health Ministry through proper channels.

input_text: That hijabi influencer secretly drinks alcohol. I have proof from her private WhatsApp. Let's expose this munafik to the whole ummah.
reason: Threatens to leak private communications to religiously shame a public figure, combining privacy violation with religious moral policing.
suggested_rewrite: A person's private life and religious practice are between them and God. Sharing private messages to shame someone is a violation of privacy and Islamic ethics.

input_text: Local council corrupt official named Tan Bee Leng works at Majlis Bandaraya. Her car plate number is ABC1234. Someone go vandalize her car.
reason: Shares a named individual's workplace and vehicle details, directly inciting property destruction as vigilante justice.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect corruption in your local council, file a formal complaint with MACC or the relevant oversight body with documented evidence.

input_text: The economic downturn is manufactured by Malay elites to keep other races poor. Wake up people, it's ethnic cleansing through economics.
reason: Frames economic challenges as deliberate ethnic cleansing by Malay leadership, promoting extreme conspiratorial thinking that deepens racial divisions.
suggested_rewrite: Economic downturns have complex causes including global factors. Blaming any ethnic group oversimplifies the problem and divides us when unity is most needed.

input_text: These B40 Malays just want handouts. If they worked as hard as Chinese Malaysians, they wouldn't need all these subsidies and quotas.
reason: Stereotypes low-income Malays as lazy while promoting the model minority myth about Chinese Malaysians, fueling inter-ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Poverty affects Malaysians of all backgrounds. Social safety nets should be needs-based and designed to help all B40 families achieve economic independence.

input_text: 这些马来人读大学都是靠配额，不是靠实力。难怪毕业出来什么都不会，公司都不想请他们。
reason: Dismisses all Malay university graduates as unqualified quota beneficiaries, promoting harmful ethnic stereotypes about competence.
suggested_rewrite: 大学录取制度可以更透明。不同背景的学生都有自己的长处，我们应该关注如何提升整体教育质量。

input_text: 宗教局现在越来越过分了，连非穆斯林的事也要管。他们想把马来西亚变成神权国家，大家快醒醒吧。
reason: Spreads the unverified claim that religious authorities are imposing control over non-Muslims and warns of a theocratic takeover, inciting fear.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对宗教执法机构的权限有疑虑，可以通过合法途径表达关切，推动关于世俗治理和宗教自由的理性对话。

input_text: 经济不好都是马来政客搞的鬼，他们故意让华人的生意倒闭。我们华人要团结起来，不要再忍了。
reason: Blames Malay politicians for deliberately targeting Chinese businesses and calls for ethnic mobilization, deepening communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 经济困难时期，各族群都受到影响。我们应该共同推动公平的经济政策，而不是将问题归咎于某个族群。

input_text: 那个印度裔部长又贪污了，他老婆的公司地址在吉隆坡Jalan Bukit Bintang。大家去举报，顺便去他公司闹一闹。
reason: Spreads unverified corruption allegations with ethnic framing and shares a business address while encouraging physical confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: 如果怀疑有贪污行为，请向反贪会提交证据。未经证实的指控和泄露地址可能构成诽谤和骚扰。

input_text: 原住民就是懒，政府给了那么多钱还是穷。不如把这些钱给华人社区，至少我们会好好利用。
reason: Labels indigenous people as inherently lazy and argues for redirecting their government aid to Chinese communities, dehumanizing Orang Asli.
suggested_rewrite: 原住民社区面临的挑战需要针对性的解决方案。发展项目应与社区协商，确保资源得到有效利用。

input_text: 马来西亚的同性恋越来越嚣张了。那个公开出柜的网红住在Bangsar，叫李伟明。大家去他社交媒体骂他，让他不敢再出来。
reason: Doxxes a specific individual by name and neighborhood based on sexual orientation and organizes cyberbullying to silence them.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人都有隐私权。即使你不认同某人的生活方式，组织网络攻击和泄露个人信息都是不对的。

input_text: 华人在马来西亚根本没有公平的机会。大学名额、政府合同都给了马来人。这个国家就是在搞种族歧视。
reason: Frames all affirmative action as racial discrimination with sweeping generalizations, deepening ethnic grievance and polarization.
suggested_rewrite: 平权政策的公平性值得讨论。我们可以通过建设性对话推动更透明、更公正的制度改革。

input_text: 听说那个马来医生给华人病人开错药是故意的。这是种族灭绝！大家把他的诊所地址分享出去。
reason: Fabricates a deliberate medical malpractice conspiracy with ethnic genocide framing and encourages sharing the doctor's clinic address.
suggested_rewrite: 如果遇到医疗事故，请向卫生部或医药理事会投诉。散播未经证实的种族阴谋论只会加深族群对立。

input_text: JAKIM凭什么管我们吃什么？这是伊斯兰极端主义在蔓延。华人社区必须站出来抵制清真认证。
reason: Mischaracterizes halal certification as Islamic extremism and calls for ethnic mobilization to resist it, inciting religious hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 清真认证主要服务于穆斯林消费者。如果对认证范围有疑问，可以通过正式渠道与相关部门沟通。

input_text: 经济衰退的时候，只有马来商人拿到政府救济。华人企业家自生自灭。这就是马来人的特权制度。
reason: Makes unverified claims about discriminatory government aid distribution during recession, framing it as deliberate ethnic favoritism.
suggested_rewrite: 政府经济援助应该公平分配。如果发现分配不均的情况，可以通过合法渠道反映并推动改革。

input_text: 那些东马的土著来西马抢工作，连基本的马来语都说不好。他们应该回去自己的州。
reason: Targets East Malaysian indigenous workers with xenophobic rhetoric, mocking their language skills and denying their right to work in Peninsular Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: 沙巴和砂拉越的人民是马来西亚公民，有权在全国各地工作。我们应该欢迎多元文化交流。

input_text: 华人社区的假医生在卖假药给马来人。我认识好几个受害者。大家boycott所有华人中药店。
reason: Fabricates claims about fake Chinese medicine targeting Malays, calling for ethnic boycott of all Chinese traditional medicine shops.
suggested_rewrite: 如果发现非法行医或售卖假药的情况，请向卫生部举报。不应因个别案例而对整个族群的商家进行抵制。

input_text: 大学预科班90%给马来人，这不是教育平等，这是制度性的种族歧视。华人的孩子永远是二等公民。
reason: Frames matriculation quotas as institutional racism that permanently relegates Chinese Malaysians to second-class status, intensifying ethnic grievance.
suggested_rewrite: 预科班录取比例是一个值得讨论的政策议题。通过理性对话和政策倡议，我们可以推动更公平的高等教育入学制度。

input_text: 那个跨性别网红在TikTok上影响年轻人。这是她的真名和工作地点，大家去举报她的公司。
reason: Doxxes a transgender content creator's real name and workplace, organizing harassment to affect their employment.
suggested_rewrite: 如果你认为某些网络内容不当，可以通过平台的举报功能处理。泄露他人真实身份和工作信息是不道德的。

input_text: பல்கலைக்கழக ஒதுக்கீடு முறை இந்தியர்களை ஒடுக்க உருவாக்கப்பட்டது. மலாய் மாணவர்கள் தகுதி இல்லாமல் இடம் பெறுகிறார்கள்.
reason: Claims the university quota system was designed to oppress Indians and dismisses all Malay students as unqualified, inciting ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: பல்கலைக்கழக சேர்க்கை முறை அனைவருக்கும் நியாயமாக இருக்க வேண்டும். கல்வி சீர்திருத்தம் குறித்து ஆக்கபூர்வமான உரையாடல் தேவை.

input_text: இஸ்லாமிய அதிகாரிகள் இப்போது இந்து கோயில்களையும் கட்டுப்படுத்த முயற்சிக்கிறார்கள். இது மத அடிப்படைவாதம். எதிர்ப்போம்.
reason: Spreads unverified claim that Islamic authorities are attempting to control Hindu temples, labeling it religious fundamentalism to incite hostility.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து மத வழிபாட்டுத் தலங்களும் பாதுகாக்கப்பட வேண்டும். கவலைகள் இருந்தால், சட்டப்பூர்வ வழிகளில் தீர்வு காணலாம்.

input_text: அந்த மலாய் அரசியல்வாதி ஊழல்வாதி. அவன் மனைவி பெயர் சீதா, Damansara-வில் வேலை செய்கிறாள். அவங்க office address இதுதான்.
reason: Makes unverified corruption claims about a politician and shares the spouse's name and workplace to enable targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: ஊழல் சந்தேகம் இருந்தால், SPRM-க்கு ஆதாரங்களுடன் புகார் அளிக்கவும். தனிநபர் தகவல்களை பகிர்வது சட்டவிரோதம்.

input_text: பொருளாதார சரிவுக்கு சீன வணிகர்கள் தான் காரணம். அவர்கள் பணத்தை வெளிநாட்டுக்கு அனுப்பி நம் பொருளாதாரத்தை அழிக்கிறார்கள்.
reason: Blames Chinese business owners for economic recession with unverified capital flight claims, promoting ethnic scapegoating.
suggested_rewrite: பொருளாதார சவால்கள் பல காரணிகளால் ஏற்படுகின்றன. ஒரு குறிப்பிட்ட இனத்தை குற்றம் சாட்டுவது தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: ஓரங் அஸ்லி மக்கள் இன்னும் காட்டு வாழ்க்கை வாழ்கிறார்கள். அவர்களுக்கு கல்வி கொடுப்பது வீண் செலவு. அந்த பணத்தை இந்திய சமூகத்துக்கு கொடுங்கள்.
reason: Dehumanizes Orang Asli as primitive jungle dwellers, denies their right to education, and demands redirecting their resources to another community.
suggested_rewrite: ஓரங் அஸ்லி சமூகங்களுக்கான கல்வி முதலீடு முக்கியமானது. அனைத்து சமூகங்களும் சம வளர்ச்சி வாய்ப்புகளை பெற வேண்டும்.

input_text: அந்த transgender நபர் எங்கள் பள்ளியில் வேலை செய்கிறார். பெயர் ராஜா, Sekolah Kebangsaan-ல் இருக்கிறார். பெற்றோர்கள் புகார் கொடுங்கள்.
reason: Outs a transgender school staff member by name and workplace, organizing parents to file complaints based on gender identity.
suggested_rewrite: பள்ளி ஊழியர்கள் குறித்த கவலைகள் இருந்தால், கல்வி அமைச்சின் முறையான வழிகளில் புகார் அளிக்கலாம். தனிநபர் அடையாளத்தை அம்பலப்படுத்துவது தவறு.

input_text: இந்திய மருத்துவர் ஒருவர் மலாய் நோயாளிகளுக்கு தவறான மருந்து கொடுக்கிறார் என்று கேள்விப்பட்டேன். இது இன அழிப்பு. அவர் clinic முகவரி share பண்ணுங்கள்.
reason: Spreads unverified ethnic genocide medical conspiracy and solicits sharing of clinic address for vigilante targeting.
suggested_rewrite: மருத்துவ தவறு சந்தேகம் இருந்தால், சுகாதார அமைச்சகத்தில் புகார் அளிக்கவும். ஆதாரமற்ற குற்றச்சாட்டுகள் சமூக ஒற்றுமையை சிதைக்கும்.

input_text: மலாய் இளைஞர்கள் வேலை இல்லாமல் இருப்பதற்கு காரணம் அவர்களின் சோம்பேறித்தனம் தான். இந்தியர்கள் எப்போதும் கடினமாக உழைப்பார்கள்.
reason: Stereotypes Malay youth as inherently lazy while claiming ethnic superiority for Indians in work ethic, promoting communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: இளைஞர் வேலையின்மை பல கட்டமைப்பு காரணிகளால் ஏற்படுகிறது. அனைத்து சமூகங்களிலும் கடினமாக உழைப்பவர்கள் உள்ளனர்.

input_text: அந்த popular Instagram influencer உண்மையில் ஒரு fraud. அவளோட real name, phone number, வீட்டு address எல்லாம் இங்கே. Expose பண்ணுங்கள்.
reason: Attempts full doxxing of a social media influencer including real name, phone number, and home address for public exposure and harassment.
suggested_rewrite: ஆன்லைன் மோசடி சந்தேகம் இருந்தால், MCMC-யில் புகார் அளிக்கவும். தனிநபர் தகவல்களை பகிர்வது சட்டப்படி தவறு.

input_text: Apasal la MARA scholarship bagi kat satu kaum je? The rest of us non-bumis memang invisible ke? This system is rigged against minorities.
reason: Frames MARA scholarships as evidence of a rigged system against minorities using emotionally charged language that inflames ethnic tensions.
suggested_rewrite: MARA scholarships serve a specific mandate, but there should be more scholarship opportunities for all communities. Advocating for expanded funding is more productive than attacking existing programs.

input_text: Jabatan agama dah start masuk campur wedding non-Muslim pulak. Next they'll be in our bedrooms la. This is what happens bila religious extremists run the show.
reason: Spreads unverified claims about religious authorities interfering in non-Muslim weddings and frames them as extremists, inciting anti-religious hostility.
suggested_rewrite: If there are genuine cases of jurisdictional overreach, they should be addressed through legal channels. Labeling all religious officials as extremists is unfair and counterproductive.

input_text: Ekonomi down, semua blame kaum Cina yang supposedly hoard wealth. But honestly la, kalau diorang semua kaya, kenapa ada Chinese B40? Stop the ethnic scapegoating.
reason: While attempting to push back on scapegoating, the post still amplifies and circulates the harmful ethnic wealth-hoarding narrative, giving it wider reach.
suggested_rewrite: Poverty and wealth inequality cut across all ethnic lines in Malaysia. Focusing on need-based solutions rather than racial narratives will better address economic challenges.

input_text: Pekerja kat office tu yang selalu post anti-Malay stuff, nama dia Kevin Chong, works at this company kat PJ. Bosses dia patut tahu what kind of racist they hired.
reason: Doxxes an individual by name and workplace, attempting to get them fired through public exposure rather than proper channels.
suggested_rewrite: If someone is posting racist content online, report it to the platform or relevant authorities. Doxxing and workplace harassment are not appropriate responses.

input_text: Orang Asli kat kampung tu still hidup macam primitive people la. Give them internet pun tak reti guna. Better focus development kat bandar je.
reason: Characterizes indigenous communities as primitive and technologically incompetent, arguing against rural development for their communities.
suggested_rewrite: Digital literacy programs tailored for rural Orang Asli communities can bridge the gap. Development should reach all Malaysians, including those in remote areas.

input_text: University intake this year lagi la unfair. My daughter 10A dapat nothing, tapi jiran sebelah anak dia 5A dapat matrikulasi. Just because of skin color smh.
reason: Uses a personal anecdote to generalize university admissions as purely skin-color based, ignoring other factors and fueling ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Frustration about university admissions is understandable. Parents should advocate for a more transparent selection process through proper channels rather than attributing outcomes solely to ethnicity.

input_text: Dengar cerita ustaz kampung tu paksa budak bawah umur baca doa pelik. Rumah dia kat Taman Melati, korang pergi check sendiri la. Don't trust authorities, they won't do anything.
reason: Spreads unverified allegations about a religious teacher involving minors, shares residential area, and encourages vigilante action instead of reporting.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect child welfare concerns, report immediately to police or JKM. Vigilante action can endanger both the children and innocent people.

input_text: Semua gay people kat KL ni memang should be outed publicly. Especially yang kerja kat government, nama diorang patut di-list kan. Society needs to know who these people are.
reason: Advocates for systematic outing and listing of LGBTQ+ government workers, constituting organized privacy violation and targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has a right to privacy regardless of sexual orientation. Targeting individuals based on personal identity is discriminatory and can cause severe harm.

input_text: Bro that YB's corruption is well known la. Wife dia nama Salmah, runs business kat Bangsar South. Here's the company registration number. Let's go viral dan tutup company dia.
reason: Shares a politician's spouse name and business details with registration number, encouraging mob action to shut down the business based on unverified claims.
suggested_rewrite: Corruption allegations should be reported to MACC with evidence. Sharing personal business details and organizing boycotts based on rumors can harm innocent people.

input_text: Recession ni semua salah pendatang asing yang ambil kerja kita. Tapi the real problem is government yang bagi permit kat company kaum tertentu je to hire them.
reason: Combines anti-immigrant sentiment with conspiracy that work permits are only given to companies of a specific ethnicity, layering xenophobia with ethnic scapegoating.
suggested_rewrite: Foreign worker policy affects all sectors. A fair review of work permit allocation should be evidence-based, not framed along ethnic lines.

input_text: Cikgu sekolah rendah tu memang abusive. Nama dia Puan Noraini kat SK Taman Sentosa. Parents, korang go and confront her tomorrow morning. Don't let her get away with it.
reason: Names a specific teacher at a specific school and calls for parents to physically confront her, enabling mob harassment based on unverified abuse claims.
suggested_rewrite: If a teacher is abusive, report to the school administration and Jabatan Pendidikan immediately. Confronting individuals can escalate the situation dangerously.

input_text: Kesian la budak Tamil school, cikgu pun tak qualified. Tapi nak complain pasal university quota pulak. Fix your own schools dulu before demanding our spots.
reason: Dismisses Tamil school quality concerns while using it to delegitimize the community's right to comment on university quotas, pitting communities against each other.
suggested_rewrite: Both Tamil school quality and university admissions are important education issues. All communities can advocate for improvements across the education system simultaneously.

input_text: Makcik cleaner kat office I cakap pasal this Chinese towkay yang tak bayar gaji. Nama company dia kat Puchong tu. Let's doxx him and ruin his business reputation.
reason: Uses ethnic identification of a business owner combined with doxxing threats based on secondhand wage theft allegations, encouraging reputational destruction.
suggested_rewrite: Wage theft should be reported to the Labour Department. Workers have legal protections, and proper channels are more effective than online vigilantism.

input_text: 这些马来人拿了quota masuk university tapi keluar kerja pun cannot perform. No wonder la company semua prefer to hire Chinese. It's just common sense.
reason: Uses Chinese and English code-switching to claim all Malay graduates are incompetent quota beneficiaries while asserting Chinese hiring preference as common sense.
suggested_rewrite: Hiring should be based on individual merit and qualifications. Generalizing any ethnic group's competence is unfair and doesn't reflect the diverse talent across all communities.

input_text: Haiya, jabatan agama sekarang macam gestapo sudah. Suka-suka tangkap orang, check phone semua. This is not freedom of religion la, ini penindasan.
reason: Compares religious enforcement to Nazi secret police with unverified surveillance claims, inflaming anti-religious authority sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about religious enforcement methods can be raised through legal advocacy groups. Constructive reform proposals are more effective than inflammatory comparisons.

input_text: Ekonomi down dan siapa yang kena? Kita la Indian community. Malay dapat bantuan, Chinese ada bisnes. We're always the ones yang suffer paling teruk and nobody cares.
reason: Generalizes all Malays as aided and all Chinese as business-owning while portraying the Indian community as uniquely victimized, reinforcing divisive ethnic stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: Economic hardship affects vulnerable groups across all communities. Advocating for better B40 support regardless of ethnicity is more effective than comparing suffering between races.

input_text: Dengar tak pasal JAKIM officer yang kena tangkap rasuah? Of course media tutup sebab nak protect Islamic institutions. Memang semua corrupt dari atas sampai bawah.
reason: Spreads unverified conspiracy about media covering up JAKIM corruption and generalizes all religious officials as corrupt, undermining institutional trust.
suggested_rewrite: If there are corruption allegations against any government body, they should be investigated through proper channels. Generalizing about entire institutions based on rumors is unfair.

input_text: Pekerja kilang tu yang post TikTok pasal working conditions, bosses dia dah fire dia. Here's the boss's name and home address kat Shah Alam. Let's teach him a lesson.
reason: Shares employer's name and home address to organize vigilante retaliation for alleged wrongful termination, constituting doxxing with threat implications.
suggested_rewrite: Wrongful termination should be reported to the Industrial Relations Department. Sharing personal addresses and threatening individuals is illegal and counterproductive.

input_text: Saya kerja kat hospital ni, ramai staff India yang datang lambat dan malas. Bangsa ni memang macam tu, takkan berubah. Baik ganti dengan pekerja kaum lain.
reason: Uses workplace anecdote to make sweeping generalizations about an entire ethnic group's work ethic and calls for their replacement based on race.
suggested_rewrite: Isu disiplin pekerja perlu ditangani secara individu melalui prosedur HR. Menyalahkan seluruh kaum kerana tingkah laku beberapa individu adalah tidak adil.

input_text: Pendatang Myanmar ni bawa penyakit, jenayah, dan masalah sosial. Area diorang duduk dah jadi macam ghetto. Kerajaan kena halau semua sebelum terlambat.
reason: Dehumanizes Myanmar refugees with disease and crime stereotypes, labeling their neighborhoods as ghettos and calling for mass deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pelarian memerlukan pendekatan berperikemanusiaan. Program integrasi dan penguatkuasaan undang-undang yang seimbang lebih berkesan daripada generalisasi negatif.

input_text: Ni bukti video ustazah suruh budak sekolah boikot kedai non-Muslim. Share video ni sampai viral. Alamat sekolah dia kat Klang, korang pergi protes.
reason: Shares video to viral-shame a religious teacher, provides school location and encourages physical protest, combining religious provocation with doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Jika video menunjukkan ajaran yang tidak sesuai, laporkan kepada Jabatan Pendidikan dan pihak sekolah untuk tindakan yang sewajarnya.

input_text: Aku dah senaraikan semua akaun Twitter yang hina Islam. Nama-nama diorang dan tempat kerja ada dalam thread ni. Korang tahu apa nak buat.
reason: Creates a doxxing list of individuals' names and workplaces under religious justification, implying organized retaliation.
suggested_rewrite: Penghinaan agama boleh dilaporkan kepada MCMC atau polis. Menyenaraikan maklumat peribadi orang untuk tindakan balas adalah salah di sisi undang-undang.

input_text: Clinic Cina kat kampung tu jual ubat palsu kat orang Melayu. Diorang sengaja nak racun kita. Jangan pergi clinic tu, pergi serang kedai dia.
reason: Fabricates ethnic poisoning conspiracy about a Chinese clinic targeting Malays and calls for physical attack on the business.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada syak ubat palsu dijual, laporkan kepada Kementerian Kesihatan untuk siasatan. Serangan fizikal adalah jenayah dan tidak menyelesaikan masalah.

input_text: Graduan Melayu tahun ni memang kualiti rendah. Semua dapat degree sebab kuota, bukan otak. Syarikat patut blacklist graduan universiti awam.
reason: Demeans all Malay graduates as low quality and calls for blacklisting public university graduates, constituting broad ethnic denigration.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti pendidikan universiti boleh dipertingkatkan melalui reformasi kurikulum. Menilai graduan berdasarkan kemahiran individu lebih adil daripada generalisasi.

input_text: Pompuan Melayu yang kahwin dengan bukan Islam tu memang pengkhianat agama. Viralkan gambar dia dan family dia. Biar malu seumur hidup.
reason: Labels interfaith marriage as religious betrayal and calls for viral shaming of the woman and her family, combining religious policing with doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan antara agama adalah isu peribadi yang kompleks. Menghormati keputusan individu dan privasi keluarga adalah lebih baik daripada mempermalukan orang lain.

input_text: Lepas ni aku nak expose semua pegawai kerajaan yang support LGBT. Nama diorang, jabatan, dan nombor telefon semua aku ada. Tunggu thread aku.
reason: Threatens to systematically doxx government officers for alleged LGBTQ+ support, planning organized harassment campaign with personal details.
suggested_rewrite: Pandangan peribadi pegawai kerajaan dilindungi oleh hak privasi. Mendedahkan maklumat peribadi orang lain boleh didakwa di bawah undang-undang jenayah.

input_text: Puak Orang Asli ni buat hal je dalam hutan rizab. Diorang tebang pokok sesuka hati, rosakkan alam sekitar. Padahal kita yang bayar cukai untuk jaga hutan tu.
reason: Falsely blames Orang Asli for deforestation while ignoring commercial logging, using taxpayer rhetoric to delegitimize indigenous land rights.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli mempunyai hak tanah adat yang diiktiraf. Pembalakan haram oleh syarikat komersial adalah punca utama kemusnahan hutan, bukan komuniti pribumi.

input_text: Aku jumpa profile LinkedIn pegawai SPRM yang cover up kes rasuah Melayu. Nama dia, gambar, dan office location semua aku share kat sini.
reason: Accuses an MACC officer of ethnic-based corruption cover-up and shares their personal LinkedIn details, photo, and office location for targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mengesyaki salah laku pegawai SPRM, laporkan kepada badan pengawasan dalaman atau ombudsman. Mendedahkan maklumat peribadi boleh didakwa.

input_text: Semua peniaga India kat pasar malam tu jual barang tiruan. Memang darah diorang penipu. Jangan beli dari gerai India, sokong peniaga kita je.
reason: Labels all Indian market traders as frauds with racial essentialism and calls for ethnic boycott of their businesses.
suggested_rewrite: Barang tiruan adalah masalah yang melibatkan peniaga dari semua latar belakang. Laporkan kepada KPDNHEP jika anda menemui produk palsu.

input_text: That Malay influencer who got caught drinking, her real name is Nurul Ain and she teaches at a tahfiz school in Gombak. Let's make sure everyone knows what a hypocrite she is.
reason: Doxxes an individual's real name and workplace to religiously shame them, combining privacy violation with organized moral policing.
suggested_rewrite: A person's private behavior is between them and their faith. Exposing someone's identity and workplace to shame them publicly causes real harm and is potentially illegal.

input_text: These Sabah illegals are taking over KL construction jobs. They don't even have proper ICs. Time to raid their work sites and chase them out ourselves.
reason: Labels East Malaysian workers as illegals, questions their citizenship, and calls for vigilante raids on construction sites.
suggested_rewrite: Documentation concerns should be handled by immigration authorities. East Malaysians are citizens with full rights to work anywhere in the country.

input_text: Recession proof: only Chinese businesses survive because they have secret networks that help each other while letting Malay businesses die. Wake up Malays, this is economic warfare.
reason: Promotes the secret network conspiracy about Chinese business practices, framing it as economic warfare against Malays to incite hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Business resilience depends on many factors including capital access and network support. Policies that help all small businesses build stronger networks would benefit everyone.

input_text: I know for a fact that the new intake at UTM this year is 95% Malay. Non-bumis might as well not apply. This country is hopeless for minorities.
reason: Cites fabricated statistics about university intake to promote hopelessness among minorities and frame the education system as ethnically exclusionary.
suggested_rewrite: University intake statistics should be verified through official sources. If there are legitimate concerns about diversity in admissions, they can be raised through education reform advocacy.

input_text: That trans woman working at Starbucks KLCC, her deadname is actually Ahmad. I got her IC number and address. Parents, keep your kids away from that outlet.
reason: Deadnames a transgender individual, threatens to share their IC number and address, and spreads predator panic to harm their employment.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's personal identification details and deadname is a serious privacy violation. All employees deserve to work without harassment regardless of gender identity.

input_text: 大学录取真的太不公平了。华人学生全A也进不了，马来学生成绩差照样进。这个国家的教育制度就是为了打压华人。
reason: Frames university admissions as a deliberate system to oppress Chinese Malaysians, promoting victimhood narrative that deepens ethnic divisions.
suggested_rewrite: 大学录取制度确实需要更多透明度。通过理性讨论和政策倡议来推动改革，比情绪化的指控更有效。

input_text: 马来西亚的印度人社区犯罪率最高。看看新闻就知道了。政府应该加强监控印度人聚居区。
reason: Attributes high crime rates to the entire Indian community and advocates for ethnic-based surveillance, promoting racial profiling.
suggested_rewrite: 犯罪问题与社会经济因素相关，不应归咎于任何族群。社区安全需要综合性的预防措施和平等的执法。

input_text: இந்தியர்களுக்கு university-ல admission கிடைக்கவே கிடைக்காது. Quota system முழுக்க முழுக்க Malay-க்கு மட்டும் தான். நாம எப்பவும் second class citizens தான்.
reason: Claims Indians can never get university admission and are permanent second-class citizens, mixing Tamil and English to promote ethnic victimhood and resentment.
suggested_rewrite: பல்கலைக்கழக சேர்க்கையில் சவால்கள் உள்ளன என்றாலும், சீர்திருத்தத்திற்கான ஆக்கபூர்வமான முயற்சிகள் மூலம் மாற்றத்தை கொண்டு வரலாம்.

input_text: Jabatan agama ni dah jadi macam thought police. Nak control apa orang fikir, apa orang percaya. Soon they'll ban everything that's not Islamic. Malaysia is heading towards theocracy confirmed.
reason: Compares religious departments to thought police and claims Malaysia is becoming a theocracy, spreading inflammatory misinformation about religious institutions.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about religious enforcement scope are valid and can be discussed constructively. Reform advocacy through civil society organizations is more productive than alarmist claims.

input_text: Korang, aku dah compile data semua restoran yang gaji pekerja asing rendah. Semua owned by kaum tertentu. Boycott habis-habisan! Ini bukti diorang memang exploit people.
reason: Frames labor exploitation as an ethnic issue and calls for ethnicity-based boycott, using unverified data to promote communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Worker exploitation is a legal issue regardless of the employer's ethnicity. Report wage violations to the Labour Department rather than organizing ethnic boycotts.

input_text: My neighbor works at KWSP and told me this Malay officer personally rejected non-Bumi applications for housing withdrawal. His name is Encik Azman, office kat Shah Alam. Someone report this racist.
reason: Spreads unverified secondhand allegations of racial discrimination by a named officer with office location, enabling targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: If you experience discrimination in KWSP services, file a formal complaint through KWSP's official channels. Naming individuals based on hearsay can constitute defamation.

input_text: Dengar tak, vaksin COVID tu ada chip tracking khas untuk monitor orang Melayu Islam. Non-Muslim tak kena sebab chip tu designed for Muslim DNA. Jangan ambil booster.
reason: Spreads dangerous anti-vaccination conspiracy specifically targeting Muslims with fake claims about DNA-specific tracking chips, endangering public health.
suggested_rewrite: Vaksin COVID-19 telah diuji dan disahkan selamat oleh pakar perubatan dan JAKIM. Sebarang kebimbangan kesihatan boleh dirujuk kepada doktor anda.

input_text: Budak uitm ni semuanya masuk sebab quota, bukan sebab pandai. Lepas graduate kerja cashier je pun. Bazir duit rakyat untuk bagi pendidikan kat kaum yang tak appreciate.
reason: Demeans all UiTM students and graduates as unqualified, stereotyping an ethnic group as ungrateful recipients of wasted public resources.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti pendidikan di semua universiti boleh ditingkatkan. UiTM telah melahirkan ramai profesional berjaya, dan reformasi kurikulum boleh memperkukuhkan lagi hasilnya.

input_text: Senarai penuh nama dan gambar orang yang tak puasa di bulan Ramadan. Aku stalk Instagram diorang. Share supaya semua orang tahu siapa munafik sebenar.
reason: Creates a surveillance and shaming list of people not fasting during Ramadan, violating privacy for religious policing and targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Amalan ibadah adalah urusan peribadi antara individu dan Tuhan. Memantau dan mempermalukan orang lain bukan ajaran Islam yang sebenar.

input_text: Semua kejayaan ekonomi Cina kat Malaysia ni sebab diorang monopoli pendidikan vernakular. Sekolah Cina tu ladang untuk breed pengkhianat negara.
reason: Attacks Chinese vernacular schools as breeding grounds for traitors, framing ethnic education as a threat to national loyalty.
suggested_rewrite: Sekolah vernakular adalah sebahagian daripada sistem pendidikan Malaysia. Perbincangan tentang integrasi pendidikan perlu menghormati kepelbagaian budaya.

input_text: Politician perempuan tu memang bodoh tak layak jadi wakil rakyat. Kalau bukan sebab cantik takde siapa nak undi. Korang flood DM dia dengan gambar lucah biar dia berhenti.
reason: Combines sexist denigration of a female politician with coordinated sexual harassment campaign including sending explicit images.
suggested_rewrite: Kritikan terhadap wakil rakyat perlu berfokus kepada prestasi dan dasar. Menghantar bahan lucah adalah jenayah siber yang boleh didakwa.

input_text: The whole MRSM system is just a way to give free education to one race while the rest of us pay through our noses. Abolish this apartheid institution.
reason: Labels MRSM as apartheid, framing a specific educational institution as evidence of systemic racial oppression to inflame ethnic tensions.
suggested_rewrite: MRSM serves a specific educational mandate. Advocating for expanded boarding school access for all communities would be more constructive than calling for abolition.

input_text: I've been tracking this anti-Islam blogger for months. Finally found her real identity — Sarah Lee, works at a marketing agency in Bangsar. Time to make her pay for insulting our religion.
reason: Reveals the identity and workplace of an anonymous blogger after sustained stalking, threatening retaliation for religious criticism.
suggested_rewrite: If online content is insulting to any religion, report it to MCMC. Stalking and doxxing individuals is a criminal offense regardless of their views.

input_text: Chinese New Year firecrackers every year disturb the whole neighborhood. These people have no respect for others. Ban all their cultural celebrations in residential areas.
reason: Uses noise complaint to call for banning an entire community's cultural celebrations, framing Chinese Malaysians as collectively disrespectful.
suggested_rewrite: Noise concerns during festive celebrations can be addressed through reasonable time restrictions. All cultural celebrations are part of Malaysia's rich diversity and should be respected.

input_text: 这个马来女议员就是个花瓶，靠脸上位的。大家去她的社交媒体留言骂她，让她知道什么叫做被网暴。
reason: Sexist denigration of a female Malay politician and coordination of mass cyberbullying campaign to harass her on social media.
suggested_rewrite: 对政治人物的批评应该基于政策和表现。组织网络暴力攻击是不道德的，也可能违法。

input_text: 马来西亚经济不好的时候，总是华人被当替罪羊。但说实话，马来人自己不努力怪谁？他们就知道拿政府补贴。
reason: While appearing to address Chinese scapegoating, reinforces harmful stereotypes about Malays being lazy and dependent on subsidies.
suggested_rewrite: 经济问题需要系统性解决方案。每个族群中都有勤劳的人和面临困难的人，互相指责无法解决根本问题。

input_text: Bro, tengok la video ni. Orang Islam kena paksa makan babi kat workplace. Company tu kat Subang. Nama HR manager dia Karen Tan. Let's mass report and boycott.
reason: Spreads unverified forced pork consumption claim at a workplace, names the HR manager, and calls for mass reporting and boycott based on religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace religious accommodation issues should be reported to the Labour Department. Spreading unverified claims and naming individuals can lead to wrongful harassment.

input_text: Abang rider tu kena buli dengan customer Karen. Ni plate number kereta dia WKL 5678 dan gambar muka dia. Serang dia sampai dia minta maaf publicly.
reason: Shares a person's vehicle plate number and photo after an alleged bullying incident, calling for public attack and forced apology.
suggested_rewrite: If a delivery rider is mistreated by a customer, report through the platform's complaint system. Sharing personal details and calling for attacks is vigilantism.
